caption: A woman with light brown hair tied back in a bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt with a white graphic while sitting in a podcast studio. She is positioned in front of a white wall featuring a yellow vertical stripe and a black acoustic panel. To her left is a screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text, and a professional microphone is positioned directly in front of her. The logos "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" appear on the screen and the wall. Throughout the clip, the woman looks toward someone off-camera to her right with a slight smile. She periodically lifts her right hand to touch her chin and neck, shifting her posture slightly while maintaining her expression. The background elements and equipment remain static as she engages in a conversation.
